name: Strateco Resources Inc.
summary: Strateco Resources Inc. explores for and develops uranium properties in Canada. It holds a 60% interest in the Matoush project that consists of the Matoush, the Matoush Extension, the Eclat, and the Pacific-Bay-Matoush properties located in the Otish Mountains of northern Qu√É¬©bec. The company was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Boucherville, Canada.
